title: Animated Sidebar

statement.markdown:
markdown: ### Challenge Description
Create an animated sidebar that slides out from the left when a button is clicked. The sidebar should have a list of links and the sidebar should close when a link is clicked.

### Requirements

1. The sidebar should be positioned absolute on the left side of the screen.
2. The sidebar should slide out from the left when the toggle button is clicked.
3. The sidebar should close when a link is clicked.
4. The sidebar should have a minimum width of 200px.
5. The links in the sidebar should have a class 'text-lg' and 'hover:text-blue-500'.
text

constraints: The problem should be solved using Tailwind CSS classes.
The sidebar should be animated using JavaScript.
The sidebar should be responsive and work on different screen sizes.
